profile.name: Suheb Ghare
profile.title: Senior DevOps & SRE Engineer
profile.tagline: Building and scaling cloud infrastructure at production scale
profile.bio: Senior DevOps & SRE Engineer with 8+ years of experience designing, building, and operating cloud-native infrastructure. Specializing in Kubernetes (EKS), AWS, CI/CD platform engineering, observability, and AI-powered DevOps automation. I write about real production challenges — not tutorials, but lessons learned from running systems at scale.

highlights: Reduced Black Friday AWS spend by 52% ($127K → $61K) while handling 3x more traffic
Built Internal Developer Platform used by 200+ engineers, reducing onboarding from 3 weeks to 2 hours
Designed reusable CI/CD template library achieving 95% code reuse across 50+ teams, saving 40 hours/month
Migrated from Cluster Autoscaler to Karpenter, saving $1,700/month (20% compute cost reduction)
Implemented secrets management system with zero leaks over 18 months across 500+ secrets
Reduced AWS bill from $180K to $108K/month (40% reduction) through systematic optimization
Cut MTTR from 47 minutes to 11 minutes using LLM-powered incident analysis
Reduced alert fatigue by 73% — from 200 noisy alerts/week to 27 actionable ones using ML correlation
Managed 500+ Terraform resources across 50+ AWS accounts
Designed multi-environment EKS architecture across 3 clusters and 2 AWS accounts

projects.name: Internal Developer Platform (IDP)
projects.description: Built a full IDP from scratch used by 200+ engineers. Backstage as portal, Crossplane for self-service infrastructure, ArgoCD for deployments, Vault for secrets, Grafana for observability.
projects.impact: Reduced time-to-first-deploy from 3 weeks to 2 hours. Infra support tickets down 70%.

projects.name: CI/CD Template Library
projects.description: Reusable GitHub Actions workflow templates for Docker build, EKS deploy, multi-language testing, and security scanning. Used by 50+ teams.
projects.impact: 95% code reuse, build time from 14 min to 6 min, security fix rollout from 2 weeks to same day.

projects.name: Black Friday Cost Optimization
projects.description: Reduced AWS spend by 52% for Black Friday peak traffic. Karpenter + Spot instances, Aurora Serverless v2, CloudFront caching, VPC endpoints.

projects.name: LLM-Powered Incident Analysis
projects.description: Built a system that automatically analyzes production incidents using GPT-4o. Fetches Prometheus metrics, CloudWatch logs, and K8s events, then generates structured RCA.
projects.impact: MTTR reduced from 41 minutes to 11 minutes. Cost: $0.08 per incident analysis.

projects.name: ML Alert Correlation System
projects.description: ML-based alert correlation using DBSCAN clustering to reduce alert noise. GPT-4 generates human-readable alert summaries with context.
projects.impact: Alert volume from 200/week to 27/week (73% reduction). False positive rate from 68% to 12%.

projects.name: Secrets Management Platform
projects.description: End-to-end secrets management using AWS Secrets Manager + External Secrets Operator + Reloader. Path-scoped IAM, automated rotation, prod in separate AWS account.
projects.impact: Zero secret leaks over 18 months. 500+ secrets with automated 30-day rotation.

projects.name: Multi-Environment EKS Architecture
projects.description: Designed 3-cluster EKS setup (dev/staging/prod) across 2 AWS accounts with shared services cluster for ArgoCD, Prometheus, and Vault.
projects.impact: Complete blast radius isolation. Dev team cannot access prod even on misconfiguration.

projects.name: Terraform at Scale
projects.description: Managed 500+ Terraform resources across 50+ AWS accounts. Module library, remote state with S3+DynamoDB, Terragrunt for DRY configs, GitHub Actions CI/CD.
projects.impact: Plan time from 12 minutes to 45 seconds after splitting monolith. Full GitOps IaC workflow.
